title: High Fashion 3x3 Grid Portrait AI
sourceTitle: High Fashion 3x3 Grid Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-fashion 3x3 studio portrait grid featuring same adult female fashion model with calm elegant expression in modest elegant dress with seamless color gradient from deep purple to vibrant violet. Subject: same adult female fashion model with calm elegant expression appears as the same female fashion model in all nine panels, with consistent face, refined expression, and polished luxury magazine styling. Scene: Minimalist studio with solid matching purple background and clean white thin rectangular frame around every panel. Composition: Fixed square 1:1 image consisting of nine separate minimalist studio portraits arranged in a 3x3 grid, each panel using one pose from standing straight, hands near jawline, seated composed posture, kneeling elegantly, classic editorial standing pose, subtle side-profile turn, sitting with legs neatly. Signature Elements: Preserved high fashion 3x3 grid portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Clean high-fashion editorial aesthetic with soft professional studio lighting, high-contrast color, 85mm fashion photography, sophisticated luxury magazine polish, and ultra-high-resolution clarity. Color Palette: Fixed deep purple to vibrant violet dress gradient, solid matching purple background, clean white panel frames, and restrained skin-tone balance. Lighting: Soft professional studio light across all panels, consistent facial modeling, gentle fabric highlights, and crisp frame edges. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
